We energize mobility. Worldwide.
Hartmann & König Stromzuführungs AG is a leading manufacturer of motorized cable reels, spring cable reels and slip ring assemblies. We supply our global customers with advanced energy and data transfer systems for mobile consumers. Our products are dependable energy and data supply solutions for the container handling, crane technology, plant engineering, mining and materials handling industries.
All-round service from a single source
Your partner for customized special solutions
Personal, partnership-based customer care from our extensive sales partner network
Made in Germany / Graben-Neudorf
Our product range
Motorized cable reels
for maximum flexibility and security
Learn more
Spring cable reels
for industrial applications
Learn more
Slip ring assemblies
for safe, secure energy and data supply to rotating components
Learn more
OUR EXPERTISE – YOUR NEEDS
With long-standing expertise in the development and manufacture of cable reels and slip ring systems, we deliver outstanding quality and prowess in mobile consumer power supply.
Our dedicated team of engineers and designers is at our customers’ service in all issues and develops bespoke solutions for even the most complex and challenging applications. We supply reels for virtually all types of motorized drive for both spiral and cylindrical winding and unwinding of cables, ropes or hoses. Our customers’ individual requests are always our priority. We are ready for any technical challenge and always able to find the perfect solution!
